Description:
What if your personal planning app could actually think with you? In this video, we walk through how to use the GitHub Copilot SDK to upgrade a basic Node.js application into a dynamic AI-powered assistant. Watch as we generate weekly meal plans, regenerate options based on changing preferences, and build custom weekend activity schedules. We also break down the code so you can build something similar today!

GitHub Copilot CLI SDK: https://github.com/github/copilot-sdk?utm\_source=social-youtube-meal-planner&utm\_medium=social&utm\_campaign=copilot-sdk-public-preview-april-2026

#GitHubCopilot #CopilotSDK #AI

— CHAPTERS —

00:00 Intro 00:24 App overview 00:43 Generating dynamic meal plans 01:37 Building the weekend planner feature 02:45 Code walkthrough
